name: Async Pipeline Worker
description: One worker in the preprocess pool. Claims next image index atomically, loads it at 80ms cadence, preprocesses (~200ms), then serializes GPU CNN inference via named lock 'GPU'. Cycles until NextIndex reaches TotalCount.

nodes.name: Claim Next Index
nodes.description: Atomic fetch-and-add on shared 'NextIndex'; the previous value is MY task index

nodes.name: MyIndex < 50 ?
nodes.description: Stop condition: exit when no more work

nodes.name: Read Image @ 80ms
nodes.description: Load images[MyIndex] after 80ms delay (simulates camera frame rate)

nodes.name: Preprocess ~200ms
nodes.description: Simulates 200ms CPU preprocessing (replace with real vision nodes in production)

nodes.name: Acquire GPU
nodes.description: Serialize access to the GPU: only one worker performs inference at a time

nodes.name: CNN Inference (GPU)
nodes.description: Runs under GPU lock. Uses simulated engine if no IInferenceEngine is registered.

nodes.name: Release GPU
nodes.description: Must always release after inference so next worker can proceed
